description: Fintual is a financial services company focused on investing and savings products in Latin America, including mutual funds, APV/pension savings, and stock investing. Its public websites include consumer information for Chile and Mexico, plus limited machine-readable developer-facing endpoints.
summary: Fintual exposes a public MCP server at `https://copilot.fintual.com/mcp/` and a documented HTTP API v1 at `https://fintual.cl/api` with a public Swagger 2.0 spec; authentication requirements for the HTTP API could not be fully determined from the public docs.
